column1:
Tropical Storm Debby LIVE coverage
Lots of rough weather and warnings!  Bring your questions. That's right now on DPL.
Denis Phillips hopefully someone warmed it up for ya 😁😁
Denis Phillips only if it rains at Disney
Denis Phillips probably because of the heat lightning!
Denis Phillips It will be delayed, like your arm movement
Denis Phillips only if Waffle House closes!! 🤣🤣🤣
Denis Phillips OMG Denis, we love you! 🤗🤗
Good night lol get some rest and eat you cheeseburger lol
Denis Phillips yes
Denis Phillips disappointed in the finale.

We're getting slammed in NPR.
I even thought I heard hail.
The thunder is nice.
Stay safe folks.
Denis Phillips is this the worst of it for the pasco area
Denis Phillips ...she mispronounced...hell....😆 🤣
You do a great job — trust your gut to do it the way that’s needed.
And yet everyone here prefers to watch you instead. That's kind of an awesome feeling I'd think.
Thank you Denis! This stream is the only reason I'm still calm. It's NASTY out there. Worse than I expected.
I was not expecting this kind of weather
We just moved to Hillsborough county - what do we do for a flash flood? Thankfully we have two stories but we’ve never experienced this before!
Stay inside
Do you know what zone you are in? Hillsborough has everything from coastal flooding to land that is high enough to not have to worry about it
Stay inside, don't ever drive through flooded roads.
not sure of the zone but about 15 east of Apollo beach right above Wimauma so pretty inland?

Flash flood is from too much rainfall and the area/ ground cannot absorb the runoff of rain as fast as it is coming down. You'll know by looking if your street is flooded or yard is holding water or you live by a river or body of water that rises from excess rain Then if it gets too bad it can come into your house. It's not usually from flooding caused by storm surge from the Gulf waters being pushed in by a storm if you live close to the water
I don’t understand how the weather channel says we get 1 inch of rain when we’ve drained our pool in Palm harbor 3x so far! Where do they get their measurements from?
Your dedication Denis is truly amazing and SO appreciated!
I appreciate humor!!!! Please keep it up. Thank you.
I love the wind. It’s almost peaceful.
Me too and the rain 🤍
So thankful for live coverage of this all night ❤️
Had my first today as a Florida girl. Leaving AMI today crossed over the Skyway bridge during TS Debby with a major rain band Thanks once is enough for me. Thanks Denis for being here for us.
What is the track or situation that scares you, generally speaking, not with this storm, your doomsday scenario

Ian was our doomsday scenario here in Pinellas because it was expected to hit here. Unfortunately for others, it hit south of here and devastated Sanibel, Englewood, etc areas. But it was our nightmare scenario when it was first forecast
This is great! Behind the scenes stuff
This is concerning!! I’m moving my bowels now but I need to get outside and get supplies before this storm comes!!!! I’m trying to finish up fast but I’m so nervous!!
TMI
Good grief !!! We aren't interested in your personal hygiene!!🤬
TMI
You guys act like not everybody has bowel movements grow up lmao
exactly 💩happens.
Hubs currently draining the pool in Lkld for the third time since Sunday morning. We’ve gotten much more than a few inches of rain
sound like my husband. He draining the pool fourth time since Saturday night. We live in Westchase /Citrus Park .
I would rather listen to you than Jim Cantore. Actually you do a great job Denis.
We agree
ABSOLUTELY!!
Thank you! My mother ex law lost cable in Largo! Appreciate you keeping this live on FB! I'm watching from Wisconsin!
I shot her a text and she said it just went off earlier.
Since we’re not worried about the wind, would love to see rainfall totals, been raining hard all day in Apollo Beach.

would like to know that too !

We are in the closet I can see my neighborhood on your map

If you are driving, please be careful. Low lowing areas may have water.
I’m on Dunedin oh line now is a good time to let pups out
My 5 year old goes on a training pad but also goes out when we can! 😂
My pool looks like it’s about to overflow
Anytime there is any heavy rain event you should drain some water out of our pool prior.
This hurricane makes me realize I'm missing my rule #7 cup. Ordering a new one now!!!!

it’ll be done tomorrow
This should be cleared up by tomorrow night in Orlando. Flooding might still remain, but flying into Orlando shouldn't be affected by this particular storm on Wed.
The one thing we are together and in agreement and people can mess up with non-sense stuff for this purpose (usually political). Thanks Denis for your commitment, we love you!

Safe travels

be safe
